content.body: how does one sign up to be a test262 maintainer?
similar to many open-source projects, just expressing interest and being active
I am interested, if you would consider me to have been adequately active
I can come to the call next week at least
you have to have been active enough that you can be trusted not to act like a dingdong if we give you the keys. I'd say you clear that bar 😄
